title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mphasis

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mphasis
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mphasis in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mphasis:
Mphasis is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis!
